name: Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides integrated financial services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Partnership Finance Business, SME Lending, Capital Investment and Management, and Other segments. The company provides credit guarantee and capital business, accounts receivables for factoring business, bill discount, finance lease, entrusted loans, financial assets management, capital investment, micro and small finance, platform finance, and other services to individual customers, microenterprises, and small and medium sized enterprises. It also offers investment and management consulting, technical consulting and services, financial factoring, and Internet financing services, as well as risk management and asset quality services. In addition, the company is involved in the receivables for factoring business; and offers standard finance products, including Jiaye loan and Lexiang Jin. Further, it provides non-financing guarantee products, such as guarantee of capital preservation fund, project performance guarantee, and litigation guarantee. Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Chongqing, the People's Republic of China.
